Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar Nov-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Joel Adler, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Winston & Strawn, LLP
Raul Aguilar, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Winston & Strawn, LLP's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, is granted in part and denied in part.
The motion is granted as the general objections are overruled and ordered stricken.
The motion is granted as to Numbers 12.1 and 12.6 as the responses are incomplete. Interrogatory responses require more than personal knowledge.
The motion is granted as to Number 15.1. The response is inadequate.
The motion is granted as to Number 17.1 as it is incomplete as it refers to documents being withheld.
The motion is inadequate as to Numbers 50.1-50.6 because by the response, there are no allegations of agreements alleged in the pleadings, no breach of any agreement, no performance excused, terminated, unenforceable, or ambiguous. If that is not Defendant's contention, that must be stated in the response. If there is no agreement, that must be a part of the response.
Late opposition has been considered.
Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order.
Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
